title: Tart Nectarine Crisp
description: A sweet and satisfying dessert featuring nectarine, perfect for warm days. Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
instructions: Roll out the tart pastry and place it in a 9-inch round baking dish.
In a large bowl, combine the nectarines, granulated sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Let it sit for 10 minutes, until the nectarines start to release their juice.
Transfer the nectarine mixture to the tart pastry-lined baking dish and spread it out evenly.
In a small bowl, mix together the oat flour, brown sugar, and cold butter until crumbly. Sprinkle this mixture evenly over the nectarine filling.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving. Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
